title: Die Bielefeld Verschwörung
overview: Bielefeld is monitored and controlled. Behind this is the 'Municipal Energy and Communication Interest Group', or SIEkom for short. First and foremost is Somo Bishi, a power-obsessed creep operating in the background, for whom no path is too immoral to achieve his goals. He is planning a superweapon that can reduce any biochemical structure to dust. There is only one item missing to complete the superweapon: an ancient artifact from the sunken city of Atlantis.
